hooks.command: if [ -f graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md ]; then echo '[Graphify] Knowledge graph report available — read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md before searching files for architectural context.' >&2; fi; exit 0

TOOL_CMD=$(cat | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$TOOL_CMD" | grep -qiE "rm -rf|git reset --hard|git clean -fd|drop table|truncate|format c:|mkfs"; then echo 'WARNING: Potentially destructive command detected. Review carefully before proceeding.' >&2; fi; exit 0
